aka: Medina Azahara, The Lost Pearl of El-Andalus
this_title: Madinat Al-Zahra, la cité perdue d'Al Andalus
trans_title: 考古西班牙失落的明珠之城
Medina Azahara, The Lost Pearl of El-Andalus
introduction: Nicknamed the “Versailles of Andalusia”, Medina Azahara is today one of the most important Islamic archaeological site. Recognized as World Heritage of Humanity, this unique caliphal city, built four centuries before the Alhambra, is the object of a new excavation campaign led by a team of international researchers.Producer: [Morgane Production](https://www.morgane-groupe.fr/fiches/madinat-al-zahra/) / [France Télévisions](https://www.france.tv/france-5/la-cite-perdue-d-al-andalus/3140115-emission-du-jeudi-24-fevrier-2022.html) / Procirep / Angoa / CNC / Al Jazeera Documentary Channel
chinese_title: 考古西班牙失落的明珠之城
foreign_title: Madinat Al-Zahra, la cité perdue d'Al Andalus
